headline: Accenture Buys Keepler To Deepen AI Data Capabilities And Investor Story
summary: Accenture (NYSE:ACN) has agreed to acquire Keepler Data Tech, a cloud-native data and AI specialist. The deal brings more than 240 cloud and AI professionals into Accenture’s global network. The acquisition is focused on strengthening AI enabled business solutions for clients in Spain and other international markets. For investors watching how major IT services firms position around AI and cloud, Accenture sits at the center of that discussion. The company’s core business spans consulting,...
